message:
fix(store): use total_cmp for sorted set scores and reject infinity in increments

Three numerical correctness fixes:

- SortedSet::insert: replace old_score == score with
  old_score.total_cmp(&score).is_eq() to avoid NaN-equals-NaN false
  positive that could skip score index updates
- incr_float/hincr_float: add is_infinite() guard alongside existing
  NaN check — overflow to infinity is now rejected before storage
- zincrby: add is_nan() || is_infinite() guard before inserting

Also optimize bitpos inner loop: replace 8-iteration bit scan with
leading_zeros() for O(1) per-byte scanning.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
